findings.description: E2E fixtures should clean stale state at setup AND teardown. Setup is reliable (always runs), teardown is courtesy (crashes skip it).
findings.proposedRule: P36: Cleanup at Setup AND Teardown

findings.description: kubectl wait timeout return code was silently discarded, causing mystery downstream failures. Every kubectl/helm call in fixtures must have return code checked.
findings.proposedRule: P37: Guard kubectl/helm Return Codes in Fixtures

findings.description: Empty variable expansion produces invalid CLI arguments. Use ${VAR:+--flag "$VAR"} to omit flags when empty.

findings.source: AC-3 implementation — vuln ignore list drift
findings.description: Duplicated config between pre-commit and E2E caused 2 missing GHSAs. Single file (.vuln-ignore) read by all consumers eliminates drift.
